title: taraxacum lusitanicum
intro: Taraxacum lusitanicum, also known as the Iberian dandelion, is a perennial plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is a member of the dandelion family and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The plant's health benefits include treating digestive issues, kidney stones, and skin conditions, as well as supporting liver and kidney function. Taraxacum lusitanicum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
